Name: Application Received
nepa_outcome__c: IDI-38709 original application received October 18 2017.
nepa_event_description__c: IDI-38709 original application received October 18 2017. Demo scenario uses March 2019 fast-track timeline.

Name: Pre-Application ID Team Consultation Completed
nepa_outcome__c: 90-minute ID Team scoping session completed. All seven specialists briefed. Six field work orders generated.
nepa_event_description__c: 90-minute ID Team scoping session completed March 12 2019. All seven specialists briefed. Six field work orders generated. Gate access schedule initiated.

Name: Section 106 Tribal Consultation Initiated
nepa_outcome__c: Consultation letter sent to Shoshone-Paiute Tribes.
nepa_event_description__c: Consultation letter sent to Shoshone-Paiute Tribes February 16 2019. HARD GATE: EA cannot advance to public review until consultation certified complete.

Name: Sage-Grouse Lek Survey Window Opens
nepa_outcome__c: Lek survey season opens.
nepa_event_description__c: Lek survey season opens. Work order scheduled as slot 1 due to tightest window closing April 30.

Name: Migratory Bird Survey Spring Window Deadline
nepa_outcome__c: Migratory bird survey completed before MBTA deadline.
nepa_event_description__c: Migratory bird survey must complete before April 14 per MBTA nesting season. Completed April 12.

Name: Sage-Grouse Lek Survey Completed
nepa_outcome__c: PHMA survey and 3.1-mile lek buffer verification completed.
nepa_event_description__c: PHMA survey and 3.1-mile lek buffer verification completed April 18 2019. Sage-grouse SUA boundary documented and photographed from field via mobile app.

Name: Section 106 Tribal Consultation Certified Complete
nepa_outcome__c: Shoshone-Paiute Tribes response received. No historic properties affected. Stage gate cleared.
nepa_event_description__c: Shoshone-Paiute Tribes response received within 30-day window March 16 2019. No historic properties affected. Certification complete. Stage gate cleared.

Name: Hydrology and Water Quality Assessment Completed
nepa_outcome__c: Jordan Creek habitat assessed. IDWR Water Permit task auto-created.
nepa_event_description__c: Jordan Creek water temperature and redband trout habitat assessed April 25 2019. TRIGGER FIRED: IDWR Water Permit task auto-created.

Name: IDWR Water Permit Application Initiated
nepa_outcome__c: Sam Uhler initiated IDWR application.
nepa_event_description__c: Auto-triggered April 25 2019. Sam Uhler initiated IDWR application April 28 via applicant portal.

Name: Geology Soils and Access Road Assessment Completed
nepa_outcome__c: Access road erosion assessed. EPA NPDES NOI task auto-created.
nepa_event_description__c: 1.7-mile access road erosion assessed May 12 2019. Reclamation plan reviewed. TRIGGER FIRED: EPA NPDES NOI task auto-created.

Name: EPA NPDES NOI IDG370000 Filed
nepa_outcome__c: NOI for Small Suction Dredge filed.
nepa_event_description__c: Auto-triggered May 12 2019. NOI for Small Suction Dredge filed May 15. 60-day processing clock started.

Name: Columbia Spotted Frog Riparian Survey Completed
nepa_outcome__c: Riparian corridor survey completed. Steep-shoreline pond design approved.
nepa_event_description__c: Riparian corridor survey completed May 28 2019. Steep-shoreline pond design approved for spotted frog deterrence compliance.

Name: Botanical Survey First Site Visit Completed
nepa_outcome__c: First botanical site visit. No special status plants found.
nepa_event_description__c: First botanical site visit June 20 2019. No special status plants found. Second visit scheduled August.

Name: EPA NPDES Agency Objection Window Cleared
nepa_outcome__c: No agency objection received. NPDES authorization on track.
nepa_event_description__c: Day-30 check: no agency objection received. NPDES authorization on track.

Name: Big Game Winter Range Assessment Completed
nepa_outcome__c: Mule deer crucial winter range overlap mapped. No significant conflicts.
nepa_event_description__c: Mule deer crucial winter range overlap mapped August 22 2019. No significant conflicts with proposed seasonal mining window.

Name: Botanical Survey Second Site Visit Completed
nepa_outcome__c: Second botanical site visit. Seed mix approved. All six field work orders complete.
nepa_event_description__c: Second botanical site visit August 28 2019. Seed mix approved for reclamation bond. All six field work orders complete.

Name: Preliminary EA Published for Public Comment
nepa_outcome__c: Preliminary EA and unsigned FONSI published. Public comment period opens.
nepa_event_description__c: Preliminary EA and unsigned FONSI published July 1. Stage gate cleared (tribal consultation certified; required field surveys complete). Public comment period opens.

Name: Public Comment Period Closed
nepa_outcome__c: Two substantive comments received: ICL (mercury/dust) and OSC (ARMPA lek buffer).
nepa_event_description__c: Comment period closed July 28. Two substantive comments received: ICL (mercury/dust) and OSC (ARMPA lek buffer). Both routed as work orders.

Name: ICL Comment Response Incorporated into EA
nepa_outcome__c: ICL Comment 3 mercury particulate analysis added to Air Quality section.
nepa_event_description__c: ICL Comment 3 mercury particulate analysis added to Air Quality section. Response memo completed August 15 — 3 weeks after comment close.

Name: OSC Comment Response Incorporated into EA
nepa_outcome__c: OSC lek buffer departure response memo citing 2019 Idaho ARMPA ROD Section 4.3 incorporated.
nepa_event_description__c: OSC lek buffer departure response memo citing 2019 Idaho ARMPA ROD Section 4.3. Incorporated into revised EA August 15 2019.

Name: IDWR Water Permit Received
nepa_outcome__c: IDWR water withdrawal permit for Jordan Creek received.
nepa_event_description__c: IDWR water withdrawal permit for Jordan Creek received September 20 2019. Co-permit requirement satisfied.

Name: EPA NPDES Authorization Received
nepa_outcome__c: EPA NPDES General Permit IDG370000 authorization received.
nepa_event_description__c: EPA NPDES General Permit IDG370000 written authorization received September 18 2019. No agency objection filed.

Name: Required Document Registry All Five Documents Verified
nepa_outcome__c: All five required documents verified. Administrative record complete. Stage gate cleared.
nepa_event_description__c: HARD GATE: All five required documents attached and verified: EA FONSI Decision Record Affected Resources Form Tribal Consultation Certification. Administrative record complete. Stage gate cleared for decision.

Name: FONSI Signed
nepa_outcome__c: FONSI signed after concurrent sign-off by Forrest Griggs and Colleen Trese.
nepa_event_description__c: FONSI signed November 20 2019 after concurrent sign-off by Forrest Griggs (geology) and Colleen Trese (ARMPA conformance).

Name: Decision Record Issued
nepa_outcome__c: LMTF Owyhee Field Manager issues Decision Record approving Alternative A.
nepa_event_description__c: LMTF Owyhee Field Manager issues Decision Record approving Alternative A November 27 2019. Applicant Sam Uhler notified via portal. Total time pre-application to decision: 8 months.
